concept.title: our concept
concept.description: stillne is an online store that delivers interior goods and daily essentials that blend into your everyday life while providing a small sense of satisfaction every time you reach for them. We carefully curate products that speak through their materials and form, without excessive decoration.

story.title: our story
story.paragraph1: stillne was born from a word meaning "stillness." Even in the midst of a busy day, we wanted to offer everyday tools that bring a moment of calm simply by holding them.
story.paragraph2: Working directly with workshops across Japan and artisans abroad, we carefully select products that prioritize texture and comfort. We deliver timeless staples that are loved for years, unaffected by passing trends.

quality.title: commitment to quality
quality.description: We only carry products of proven quality that can be used for a long time.

design.title: minimal design
design.description: We pursue beautiful forms that are simple yet harmonize with any space.

sustainability.title: sustainability
sustainability.description: We value environmentally conscious material selection and products built to last.

ceramic.title: Ceramics
ceramic.description: Vessels where the warmth of clay and beauty of glaze harmonize

wood.title: Natural Wood
wood.description: Solid wood furniture and goods that age beautifully

fabric.title: Textiles
fabric.description: Natural fabric with a focus on touch and comfort

glass.title: Glass
glass.description: Glassware that captures light and adds transparency to spaces

cta.title: products for your everyday life
cta.description: Discover items carefully curated by stillne to enrich your daily life.

guide.title: size & care guide
guide.subtitle: a guide to help you enjoy your products for years to come

size.title: size guide
size.description: Please refer to the general size ranges by category. Detailed measurements for each product are listed on their respective product pages.

care.title: care guide by material
care.description: Proper care for each material will help keep your products beautiful for a long time.

ceramic.title: Ceramic Care
ceramic.tip1: Wash gently with a soft sponge after use and dry thoroughly
ceramic.tip2: Avoid sudden temperature changes (except microwave-safe items)
ceramic.tip3: When stacking, place a cloth between items to prevent scratches

wood.title: Natural Wood Care
wood.tip1: Wipe with a dry or well-wrung cloth. Avoid leaving moisture on surfaces
wood.tip2: Apply a thin coat of wood oil every six months to maintain shine
wood.tip3: Avoid prolonged direct sunlight or proximity to heaters

fabric.title: Fabric Care
fabric.tip1: Check care labels and hand wash or use delicate cycle
fabric.tip2: Avoid tumble dryer. Reshape and dry in shade
fabric.tip3: Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth

glass.title: Glass Care
glass.tip1: Hand wash with a soft sponge and dry immediately to prevent water marks
glass.tip3: Non-heat-resistant glass should not be subjected to sudden temperature changes

deliveryTime.title: delivery time
deliveryTime.description: Orders are typically shipped within 3-5 business days after confirmation. Delivery times vary by region, but items usually arrive within 1-3 days after shipment.

shippingFee.title: shipping fee
shippingFee.description: Flat rate shipping of ¥880 (tax included) nationwide. Free shipping on orders over ¥10,000.
shippingFee.note: * Additional shipping charges may apply for Okinawa and remote islands.

packaging.title: packaging
packaging.description: Items are carefully packaged for delivery. If you would like gift wrapping, please let us know at the time of order.

returns.title: returns & exchanges
returns.description: Returns and exchanges are accepted within 7 days of delivery for unused items only. If there are any defects or damage during shipping, please contact us.

commerce.title: legal notice
commerce.subtitle: disclosure under the specified commercial transactions act

price.title: Pricing
price.value: Tax-included prices are displayed on each product page

additionalFees.title: Additional Fees
additionalFees.value: Shipping: ¥880 flat rate (tax included). Free shipping on orders over ¥10,000.

payment.title: Payment Methods
payment.value: Credit cards (VISA, Mastercard, JCB, AMEX), Apple Pay, Google Pay

paymentTiming.title: Payment Timing
paymentTiming.value: Credit card: Charged at the time of order confirmation.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.value: Orders are shipped within 3-5 business days after confirmation.

returns.title: Returns & Exchanges
returns.value: Returns and exchanges are accepted within 7 days of delivery for unused items only. Shipping costs for customer-initiated returns are borne by the customer. For defective items or shipping damage, we will cover return shipping costs.

cancellation.title: Cancellations
cancellation.value: Cancellations are accepted only for orders that have not been shipped. Cancellations after shipment will be treated as returns.

privacy.title: privacy policy
privacy.subtitle: how we handle your personal information
privacy.intro: stillne (hereinafter "we" or "our store") considers the protection of personal information an important responsibility and handles it appropriately in accordance with the following policy.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.description:
We may collect the following personal information when you make purchases or inquiries:
・Name
・Address
・Phone number
・Email address
・Payment information

purpose.title: Purpose of Use
purpose.description:
Personal information is used only for the following purposes:
・Shipping products and related communications
・Order confirmation and responding to inquiries
・Service improvement and new service announcements
・Newsletters and notifications (only with your consent)

thirdParty.title: Disclosure to Third Parties
thirdParty.description: We will not provide personal information to third parties without your consent. However, we may share information with service partners such as shipping carriers to the extent necessary for service delivery.

management.title: Information Security
management.description: We implement appropriate security measures to prevent unauthorized access, loss, or leakage of personal information.

disclosure.title: Access, Correction & Deletion
disclosure.description: If you wish to access, correct, or delete your personal information, please contact us through the inquiry form. We will respond promptly after verifying your identity.

cookies.title: Use of Cookies
cookies.description: Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You may disable cookies through your browser settings, though some features may not function properly.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.description: This policy may be updated without prior notice due to changes in laws or services. Updated policies take effect upon publication on our website.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description:
For inquiries regarding personal information handling, please contact us at:
Email: contact@stillne.com

terms.title: terms of service
terms.subtitle: terms and conditions for using our service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service (hereinafter "Terms") set forth the conditions for using the online store service provided by stillne (hereinafter "our store"). By using our service, you are deemed to have agreed to these Terms.

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: These Terms apply to the purchase of products and use of related services through our website.

account.title: Account
account.description: Please provide accurate information when registering an account. You are responsible for managing your account information. If you discover unauthorized use of your account, please contact us immediately.

order.title: Orders
order.description: An order is considered confirmed when we send an order confirmation email. We may be unable to fulfill orders due to inventory availability.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Payment methods are limited to those specified by our store. Credit card information is processed through secure payment services and is not stored by us.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.description: Copyrights and other intellectual property rights for images, text, logos, and other content on our website belong to us or their rightful owners. Unauthorized reproduction or redistribution is prohibited.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.description: While we make every effort to ensure service continuity and information accuracy, we do not guarantee them completely. We are not liable for damages caused by force majeure such as natural disasters or system failures.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.description: These Terms may be updated without prior notice as needed. Updated terms take effect upon publication on our website.

law.title: Governing Law & Jurisdiction
law.description: These Terms are governed by Japanese law. The Tokyo District Court shall have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes related to our store.

faq.title: frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: common questions about shopping with us

q1.question: How much is shipping?
q1.answer: Flat rate shipping of ¥880 (tax included) nationwide. Free shipping on orders over ¥10,000.

q2.question: How long does delivery take?
q2.answer: Orders are shipped within 3-5 business days after confirmation. Delivery takes 1-3 days after shipment.

q3.question: Can I return or exchange items?
q3.answer: Returns and exchanges are accepted within 7 days of delivery for unused items. Please contact us for any defects or shipping damage.

q4.question: Do you offer gift wrapping?
q4.answer: Yes, you can select gift wrapping at checkout. Items will be wrapped in stillne original wrapping paper.

q5.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q5.answer: We accept credit cards (VISA, Mastercard, JCB, AMEX), Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

q6.question: Can I cancel my order?
q6.answer: Cancellations are accepted only for orders that have not been shipped. Please contact us through My Page or the inquiry form.

q7.question: Do you ship internationally?
q7.answer: Currently, we only ship within Japan. International shipping is not available at this time.

q8.question: How should I care for my products?
q8.answer: Care instructions specific to each product's material are listed on the product page. Please contact us if you have any questions.

contact.title: contact us
contact.subtitle: feel free to reach out with any questions

form.subject: Subject
form.success: Your inquiry has been received. Please allow 2-3 business days for a response.
form.error: Failed to send. Please try again later.
